Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

This is a nice change - It's been a while since I actually saw this message in the wild, but it is really cryptic.

If you end up revising the patch, you could add:

Test-Parameters: trivial

To the commit message (before your Signed-off-by).

Since it just changes the format of an error message that probably doesn't even print during testing, it can skip the full suite of tests.

Patch Set 1:

(Reference on Test-Parameters in case it's of interest:
https://wiki.whamcloud.com/display/PUB/Changing+Test+Parameters+with+Gerrit+Commit+Messages )
Uploaded patch set 2.

commit.subject: LU-14771 ptlrpc: Rearrange version mismatch message
commit.message:
LU-14771 ptlrpc: Rearrange version mismatch message

Minor change to reposition the client version string on
console warning message, and merge split string to one line

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andrew Elwell <Andrew.Elwell@gmail.com>
Change-Id: I89242cff873028f4f76bafdd5a14f169a98f7875
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/44029
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
